title: SQIR modular multiplier  x -> a*x mod N  (bits=3, N=3, a=2)  --  stages are REAL sub-gadgets (to_gate, decomposable)
input: x = q0..q2 = input integer (bits=3 = data-register width; needs 2N <= 2^bits)
w = q3..q14 = workspace |0>   (full SQIR budget = sqir_total_dim 3 = 23; q15..q22 unused)

blocks.label: encode adapter  (swap data q0-2 <-> shifted target q12-14)
in-place  x a mod N  (shifted multiplier on q4-14)
